## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User Impact

Describe the workflow or behavior affected.

## Validation

- [ ] Full test suite passes.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused tests.
- [ ] UI changes were checked in dark and light themes.
- [ ] No save, build output, cache, log, credential, or personal data is included.

## Read-Only Boundary

- [ ] This change does not serialize, patch, replace, inject, convert, restore, or overwrite a Palworld save.
- [ ] Map annotations and preferences remain separate from game data.
- [ ] Any world-loading change verifies bytes, size, hash, and modification time remain unchanged.

## Screenshots

Add sanitized screenshots for visible UI changes.
